description_long: This figure depicts a shirtless adult male with a striking, stylized clown mask and a tall, spiked mohawk hairstyle. His upper body is adorned with intricate gold tattoos and he wears black, cropped cargo pants with a white belt and visible pocket chains. Both forearms are covered with elaborate, armored bracers featuring gold and black designs. He wears white athletic sneakers and fingerless gloves, adding to his urban, rebellious appearance. The overall look is highly stylized, blending elements of street fashion, fantasy, and performance art.
description: A shirtless adult male with a clown mask, spiked mohawk, gold tattoos, armored bracers, black cargo pants, and white sneakers, exuding a bold urban and fantasy-inspired style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the clown mask, mohawk, gold tattoos, bracers, and full chest detail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mohawk, bracer, and the side of the cargo pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back tattoos, mohawk from behind, and the back of the pants with pocket chains.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the right arm bracer, side tattoos, and the profile of the pants and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: urban cropped cargo pants, armored forearm bracers, fingerless gloves, and athletic sneakers
